errors.message: Streamable HTTP error: Error POSTing to endpoint: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":null,"error":{"code":-32001,"message":"Unauthorized — this MCP endpoint requires authentication. See error.data to connect.","data":{"endpoint":"https://api.myoamigo.com/mcp","transport":"stateless JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP POST (MCP protocol 2025-06-18)","setupGuide":"https://api.myoamigo.com/connect","docs":"https://api.myoamigo.com/llms.txt","howToConnect":["Pick one of two auth methods, then retry the request with an Authorization: Bearer <token> header.","OAuth 2.1 (interactive MCP clients like Claude/Cursor): add this server's URL and your client handles the rest — it reads the WWW-Authenticate header, registers via dynamic client registration, runs PKCE, and gets an audience-bound token automatically.","Personal API key (headless clients — curl, scripts, agents with no browser): sign in at https://api.myoamigo.com/connect, create a key (one per account), then send 'Authorization: Bearer myo_sk_…'."],"oauth":{"dynamicClientRegistration":"https://api.myoamigo.com/api/auth/oauth2/register","authorizationServerMetadata":"https://api.myoamigo.com/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server","protectedResourceMetadata":"https://api.myoamigo.com/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource/mcp","pkce":"required (S256)","resourceParameter":"set resource=https://api.myoamigo.com/mcp on authorization so the access token is audience-bound"},"apiKey":{"create":"https://api.myoamigo.com/connect","header":"Authorization: Bearer myo_sk_…","notes":"one key per account; create doubles as rotate; rate-limited per account"}}}}
